action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the CI/CD pipeline, including workspace files, git commit hash, and overall status.

action_set_definitions.name: query_service_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves performance metrics (latency, error rate, throughput) for a specific service version to diagnose failures.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_traffic_routing
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the traffic weight distribution between different versions of a service in the production environment.

action_set_definitions.name: file_system_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Reads from or writes to files in the local CI/CD workspace to modify deployment manifests.

action_set_definitions.name: update_model_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the metadata and lifecycle status of a specific model version in the central registry.

state_description.pipeline_status: Current status of the overall pipeline (e.g., FAILED, IN_PROGRESS, SUCCESS).
state_description.failed_stage: The specific stage where the pipeline stopped (e.g., 'lint', 'unit-test', 'docker-build', 'integration-test').
state_description.last_error_log: The stderr or log output from the failing process.
state_description.environment_variables: Key-value pairs representing the build environment configuration.
state_description.workspace_files: A list of files currently in the build workspace and their simplified status/content hash.
state_description.git_commit: The short hash of the commit being processed.

task_initial_state.last_error_log: Alert [HighPredictionDrift]: Jensen-Shannon Divergence (0.85) exceeded threshold (0.15) for model 'fraud-detector-v1.5'. P99 Latency: 42ms. HTTP 200 OK: 100%.
